headline: Iran SLAMS 🇮🇷💥 US Bases for $800M OWN GOAL 😩💸
text:
Iranian ayatollah squad 🇮🇷🕌 dropping BOMBS 💣🚀 on Uncle Sam's 🦅💰 Middle East playgrounds 🏜️✈️, racking up a THICC $800M 😱💸 damage bill in the first TWO WEEKS 📅🔥 – that's CSIS 🤓📊 and BBC 📰 spilling the REAL tea ☕ no cap! Much of the PAIN 😩💥 hit right after Trump 🍊🦅 and Bibi 👳‍♂️🇮🇱 launched their 'Operation FREEDOM EAGLE' 🦅🇺🇸 on Feb 28, turning Persian Gulf into a HOT MESS 🔥🌊!

Thaad radar 🛡️📡 got SCHRECKED 😱💥 at Jordan air base – that bad boy costs $485M 🤑🔥 per CSIS budget deets 📜💰, now SMOKING 🏭💨 like a bad hookah sesh! Extra $310M 🤑🏗️ trashed buildings, sats 👁️🛰️, and air-defence toys across UAE 🕌, Kuwait 🇰🇼, Qatar 🕌, Saudi 🏜️ – Iran hitting REPEAT 🎯🔄 on Ali Al-Salim, Al-Udeid, Prince Sultan bases per BBC Verify satellite snaps 🛰️📸! Pootin 🤵🇷🇺 sliding intel 📡 to Tehran mullahs 🕌 like a bromance glow-up 💕🔥, targeting US 'eyes & ears' 👀👂 from Bahrain naval pad 🛥️ to Camp Arifjan radar dome POP 💥🛡️!

DoD 🤐🛑 ghosting BBC like bad Tinder date 👻📱, US Central Command ⛩️ no comment – but Mark Cancian CSIS daddy 👨‍💼📈 calling it UNDERREPORTED AF 😤📉! Trump lost 13 GIs 🪖😢 since kicking off the Iran beatdown 🇮🇷💥, Hrana tallying 3,200 dead including 1,400 civvies 🏚️😭 – but Donny brags 'We're SLAYING in Iran 🇮🇷🔥' at WH rave 🎉🏰, claiming nuke program 💣☢️ SMASHED, conventional forces 🤖💀 degraded, proxy squads 🚫👥 ended!

Global economy SHAKING 🍑😰 cuz Strait of Hormuz ALMOST CLOBBERED 🚫🌊, oil BRRRR 📈🛢️ wildin' – will Trump send BOOTS 🥾🇺🇸 or keep it drone daddy style 🚁💨? War tab? FIRST 6 DAYS $11.3BN 💸🤑, 12 DAYS $16.5BN 📊😵 – Pentagon begging $200BN MORE 🤑🙏, DefSec Pete Hegseth 💪📢 dropping truth bombs: 'Takes MONEY 💰 to KILL bad guys 🦹‍♂️💥!' Thaad parts YANKED from SK 🥋🇰🇷 to patch ME holes 🕳️🛡️ – Iran not just clapping back, they're THRUSTING ⬆️😩 with precision strikes like a Call of Duty noob farmer 🎮🔫! Wall Street simps 🤡📉 sweating oil spikes 🛢️📈 while mullahs YEET radomes 🛡️🚫 – Trump-Mossad tag team 👫🔥 vs Persian posse 🇮🇷🕌, who gon' tap out first? 😤💦 WSJ/CSIS spilling deets 📰🔥, but sat imagery LOCKED by US providers 🤫🛰️ – stay WOKE fam 👀‼️
